comment: Allocation registry for out-of-tree extensions against Perfetto trace
protos. Three scopes are tracked here:
* TrackEvent   -- typed-event payloads emitted on a track (`extend TrackEvent`)
* TracePacket  -- top-level trace packet types (`extend TracePacket`)
* InternedData -- per-sequence interned data types (`extend InternedData`)
Adding a new allocation:
* Pick an unused tag range and add it as a new entry under the matching
scope's `allocations`. Existing ranges are immutable -- bumping or
overlapping them breaks wire compatibility.
* Each allocation must declare exactly one of:
`proto`    -- path to a leaf .proto in this repo,
`registry` -- path to a sub-registry (delegates further),
neither    -- the entry MUST be named "unallocated" (this is the
only way to reserve a hole; entries with any other
name are required to have `proto`, `registry`, or
-- for remote sources -- `repo`).
* `repo` is set for entries whose source of truth lives outside this repo
(e.g. android-internal). Tooling skips downloading those.
See docs/instrumentation/extensions.md for the full extension model.
tools/tracing_proto_extensions reads this file and a CI check enforces
that every proto file's extend-block tag numbers fall inside an allocation.

allocations.name: chromium
comment: The source of truth lives in chromium. A copy exists in
the Perfetto GitHub repo under
protos/third_party/chromium/chrome_track_event.proto
and is kept up-to-date via a Skia autoroller.

allocations.name: android_system
comment: Sub-registry lives in the Android tree. Schema is
split between frameworks/base/proto/tracing/ and
frameworks/native/tracing/, aggregated into the
descriptor zip installed at the path below. See
https://github.com/google/perfetto/discussions/4783.

allocations.name: unallocated
comment: The next allocation goes here. Shrink and take from here.

allocations.name: android_vendor
comment: Introduced by ag/39003368

allocations.name: perfetto_tests
allocations.description: Reserved for Perfetto unit and integration tests

allocations.name: android_frameworks_base

Wrapper: FrameworksBaseTracePacket.
